title: Ledger Verification (Background Service)
content:
s1[1. Verify append-only constraints are active
Check that UPDATE/DELETE triggers exist on:
actions.action_state_history
actions.action_audit_events
Query pg_trigger system view]

s2[2. Verify row integrity
Check row counts match expectations
Verify no gaps in sequence numbers per action]

logerr[Log error with details
LogError: Audit trail integrity constraint
missing or inactive
table, constraint_type]

s4[4. Log verification result
LogDebug: Ledger verification passed
tables_checked, rows_sampled]
